name_cn:
OHANEL 24A Handle Messenger Bag Black
A messenger bag that blends cool and elegance, made of oil-waxed lambskin with vintage hardware. The whole bag has a strong vintage feel❣️❣️ It's a heart-fluttering style✨✨ It's also quite spacious, fitting daily essentials like a phone. It can be worn crossbody or handheld, and grabbing it casually adds a highlight to your overall look!
size:20×20×7cm 99385
